reads.market_condition: All three index proxies open the week with a bearish tone and 4H structures the scanner reads as coiled, and each is set to open as an inside bar against its prior day range. There are no armed setups on the board — nothing has cleared the gates yet, so this is a watch-and-wait tape. The inside-bar opens mean direction is undecided until one side of the prior range gives way.

reads.read: Price sits below the prior close and inside yesterday's range, with the prior day high at 747.29 capping and the prior day low at 740.80 as the floor — the same pair also mark the daily magnets on each side. The 4H is coiled and the next bar opens as an inside bar, so nothing resolves until one edge of that range breaks. A close through either extreme is what would give the coil a direction to work with.

QQQ opens inside a notably wide prior day range, capped near 702.30 and floored down at 686.76, with weekly magnets stacked at those same levels below and up at 724.36 above. The distance to the lower rung means there is room beneath if sellers take control, but the inside-bar open keeps it undecided. Watch which side of the prior range gets tagged first.

IWM is the flattest of the three, essentially unchanged and pinned tightly between 296.13 above and 291.64 below — a compressed inside-bar open with little separation from the prior close. The 4H magnet at 292.95 sits just under price as the nearer downside reference. It needs a break of one of those daily edges before the coil means anything.
